system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.95, distrusted_peers=['r2c2', 'r3c3'].
Your latest belief: Cascading network failure—all peers in critical deficit (10–38% SoC). Islanded operation with ~22 min autonomy. P2P sharing blocked network-wide. Escalating to dr_aggregator for coordinated grid intervention (load shedding, demand response, reconnection). Suspend all outbound transfers to preserve survival reserves..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
